case_title: LEE, ANNE N. VS TAM, FREDERICK

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO DEFT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,320.00 FILED BY LEE, ANNE N. AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, FREDERICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, FREDERICK
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2007 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (DEPARTMENT 506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, ANNE N. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAM, FREDERICK $830.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $890.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $830.00. THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF'S TOTAL DAMAGES TO BE $3320.00 AND ATTRIBUTES 75% OF THE FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT TO PLAINTIFF FOR A TOTAL NET AWARD OF $830.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
